Package org.apache.juneau.commons

package org.apache.juneau.commons
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau
     
    org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
    Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.collections
    Enhanced collection utilities that extend the standard Java Collections Framework with fluent APIs, specialized collection types, and caching capabilities.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.concurrent
    Concurrent programming utilities including locks and synchronization primitives.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion
    Type conversion utilities for converting between different object types.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.function
    Functional programming utilities including enhanced function interfaces, consumers, suppliers, tuples, exception-handling variants, and large-dataset streaming APIs.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.http
    Lightweight HTTP header value types and parsing utilities.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart
     
    org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
    Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.io
    File and stream utilities, console support, MIME type detection, and path builders for working with files and I/O operations.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.lang
    Language utilities including value wrappers, version management, string formatting, state enums, and other common language constructs.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.logging
     
    org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
    Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime
    Runtime / process-entry data carriers.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
    Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.svl
    Simple Variable Language
    org.apache.juneau.commons.time
    Time and date utilities including time providers and granular date/time handling.
    org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
    Common internal utilities.
  • Class
    Description
    AnnotationGroup
    Applied to annotations that belong to a similar group (e.g.
    AnnotationObject
    A concrete implementation of a Java annotation that can be created programmatically at runtime.
    AnnotationObject.Builder
    Builder for AnnotationObject objects.
    AppliedAnnotationObject
    An implementation of an annotation that can be dynamically applied to classes, methods, fields, and constructors at runtime.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.Builder
    Builder for AppliedAnnotationObject objects.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderC
    Builder for applied annotations targeting constructors.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderM
    Builder for applied annotations targeting methods.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF
    Builder for applied annotations targeting methods and fields.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTM
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes and methods.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes, methods, and fields.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMFC
    Builder for applied annotations targeting classes, methods, fields, and constructors.
    AppliedOnClassAnnotationObject
    An implementation of an annotation that can be dynamically applied to classes, methods, fields, and constructors, with additional support for type-safe class targeting via the AppliedOnClassAnnotationObject.onClass() property.
    BasicRuntimeException
    Subclass of runtime exceptions that take in a message and zero or more arguments.
    Builder
    Identifies a class as a builder for a POJO class.
    Constants
    Global constants used across the Juneau framework.
    ExternalDocs
    Swagger external documentation annotation.
    InvalidAnnotationException
    Defines an invalid usage of an annotation.
    Items
    Swagger items annotation.
    Schema
    Swagger/OpenAPI/JSON Schema annotation.
    Schema.Array
    A collection of @Schema annotations.
    SubItems
    Swagger items annotation.
